synergies.teammate_name: Seven Assoc. South Section 6 Director Outis

core_idea: Seven Assoc. South Section 4 Heathcliff is a Status Specialist — **Rupture** burst kit — stack on a focus target, then cash out with **Forensics** while Rupture Count is high.
playstyle_guide:
- **Rupture** deals damage **when the target is hit** — stack Potency and Count before your heavy coins land.
- Build to **6+ Rupture**, then unload **Forensics** for amplified on-hit burst damage.

**S1 — Intuition** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Extremely Low).
- If target has 6+ Rupture, Coin Power +1

**S2 — The Wrap-Up** (BP 6, CP +10, x1): rolls — low 6, high 16 (Slightly Low).
- Stacks 1 Rupture — use every appearance to build up.
- Inflict 1 Defense Level Down next turn; [On Hit] Inflict +2 Rupture Count

**S3 — Forensics** (BP 4, CP +2, x4): rolls — low 4, high 12 (Extremely Low).
- If target has 6+ Rupture, Coin Power +1
- Stacks 3 Rupture — use every appearance to build up.
- Stacks 1 Rupture — use every appearance to build up.

Combat passive — **Instinctive Read**: When attacking a target with a damage type the target is "Fatal" (Resistance>x1.5) to, inflict +1 more Rupture with Skill effects.
  - If 4 or more surviving units, including this unit, are Fixers, additional +1 more Rupture.

Combat passive — **Connect The Dots**: 1 ally that has the highest Max HP inflicts +1 more Rupture with Skill effects when attacking a target with a damage type that the target….
  - If the ally is a Fixer, additional +1 more Rupture.
team_suggestions: **Rupture**-focused kit — stack Rupture on the right target, then cash out when threshold skills unlock full damage.
